ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not listed by Maylender as a member of the Riaccesi Academy in Palermo. For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Felicella, Palermo, Vol.II, pp. 147-148 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.) For Magri`s affiliation to the Riaccesi see Pietro Magri, Le Vittorie Eucharistiche, Palermo, Cirilli, 1651
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
